# Priyanshu Chawda

## Overview
Priyanshu Chawda is an AI-focused software engineer from Pune, India. He builds LLM workflows, MCP tools, developer automation, and full-stack AI applications with typed APIs, evals, safety boundaries, TypeScript, Python, Gemini, and Next.js.

## RepoSentinel MCP
- Page: https://priyanshuworks.tech/projects/reposentinel-mcp
- GitHub: https://github.com/priyanshuchawda/reposentinel-mcp
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/reposentinel-mcp
- Package: reposentinel-mcp
- Version: 0.1.1
- Install: npx -y reposentinel-mcp
- Summary: RepoSentinel MCP is a read-only TypeScript Model Context Protocol server for local repository inspection, skill routing, repository audits, documentation evidence checks, and issue or PR planning.
- Safety: read-only by default, bounded to the supplied project root, redacts common secret formats, and does not expose unrestricted shell execution, auto-push, auto-merge, auto-delete, or remote repository mutation tools.
- Keywords: RepoSentinel MCP, reposentinel-mcp, Model Context Protocol server, MCP server, repository audit MCP, npm MCP server, Codex MCP server, Claude MCP server, skill routing, documentation evidence audit.

## Services
- MCP Tool Development: Model Context Protocol tools and servers for AI agent tool access.
- LLM Workflow Engineering: RAG, prompt, evaluation, and orchestration workflows.
- Full-Stack AI Applications: Next.js, TypeScript, and Python AI product builds.
